rationale: The potential US-Iran deal remains the most relevant story for Poland due to its energy price implications, but conflicting signals mean no qualitative change yet; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal signing disputed — Sunday timeline unclear
top_events.summary: Trump claims a deal will be signed Sunday but Tehran disputes the timing, keeping energy market uncertainty alive. For Poland, a confirmed deal could lower gas/oil prices, but no confirmation yet.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Britain intercepted a vessel linked to Russia's sanctions-evading oil fleet, a development relevant to Poland's interest in tightening pressure on Russian energy revenues. Modest but new development.

top_events.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM
top_events.summary: Romania forming a new government is a minor regional political development with negligible direct impact on Polish daily life.
